subject: Re: Fwd: B727 Paint Scheme Design
body:
an large draped american flag on the tail,, and i ned to see different stripe schemes


----- Original Message ----
From: "LVJET@aol.com" <LVJET@aol.com>
To: kellens@earthlink.net
Cc: JEEPROJECT@YAHOO.COM
Sent: Tuesday, February 26, 2008 11:03:32 PM
Subject: Fwd: B727 Paint Scheme Design


http://www.schemedesigners.com/B727-JEGE
 






Delicious ideas to please the pickiest eaters. Watch the video on AOL Living.


-----Inline Message Follows-----

Hi Larry:

The preliminary paint scheme designs for the B727 are online at http://www.schemedesigners.com/B727-JEGE.

I look forward to your detailed comments.

Have some ideas progressed on the S76?


Best Regards,

Craig Barnett
Scheme Designers, Inc.
Office:  201-569-7785
Mobile:  917-405-3862

-----Original Message-----
From: jetcare@aol.com
Sent: Friday, February 15, 2008 11:35am
To: craig@schemedesigners.com, lvjet@aol.com
Subject: Re: B727 Paint Scheme Design


Probably the sooner the better.  I appreciate your assistance.

Larry


-----Original Message-----
From: Craig Barnett, Scheme Designers, Inc. <craig@schemedesigners.com>
To: jetcare@aol.com
Sent: Fri, 15 Feb 2008 9:46 am
Subject: B727 Paint Scheme Design





Hi Larry:

 

I will prepare the drawings.  Let me know when you need them. 

 


Best regards from London,

 

Craig Barnett, CEO

Scheme Designers, Inc.

21 Broadway, Suite 204

Cresskill, NJ  07626

201-569-7785

917-405-3862 – Mobile

www.schemedesigners.com





From: jetcare@aol.com [mailto:jetcare@aol.com] 
Sent: Friday, February 15, 2008 9:09 AM
To: craig@schemedesigners.com; lvjet@aol.com
Subject: Fwd: (no subject)


 

Craig can you make a rendering of this scheme on our airplane?  Eliminate the the Logo's on the vertical and fuselage.  The colors would be the Pheanton Gray and Off White we used on GIIB N909JE.
Larry
561-317-3082


-----Original Message-----
From: LVJET@aol.com
To: JETCARE@aol.com
Cc: jetcare@attglobal.net
Sent: Thu, 14 Feb 2008 8:34 am
Subject: (no subject)



Here is the paint scheme for B727,,,,G2 tan for light color and G2 dark color for stripe.
